    G

    GameParameters - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.game
    Defines the constant configuration parameters for the poker game.
    GameParameters() - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.game.GameParameters
     
    getAvatarIndex() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.player.Player
    Returns the index of the player's avatar.
    getAvatarIndex() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.server.network.ServerEndpoint
    Returns the avatar index selected by the client.
    getBet() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.player.Player
    Returns the player's current bet.
    getBetThreshold() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.gameRepresentation.TableRepresentation
    Returns the current bet threshold.
    getBetThreshold() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.game.Table
    Returns the current bet threshold.
    getChatMessages() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.gameRepresentation.TableRepresentation
    Gets the list of recent chat messages.
    getChatMessages() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.game.Table
    Returns the list of chat messages exchanged during the game.
    getChips() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.player.Player
    Returns the number of chips the player currently holds.
    getCommandQueue() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.server.Server
    Returns the command queue used for communication between server and game logic.
    getCommunityCards() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.gameRepresentation.TableRepresentation
    Gets the community cards on the table.
    getCommunityCards() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.game.Table
    Returns the deck of cards used in the game.
    getDealerIndex() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.gameRepresentation.TableRepresentation
    Gets the index of the dealer.
    getDealerIndex() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.game.Table
    Returns the index of the dealer.
    getEndpoint() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.player.Player
    Checks if the player is disconnected.

    getHandRanking() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.cards.CardCombo
    Returns the hand ranking of this CardCombo.
    getKickers() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.cards.CardCombo
    Returns the kickers in this CardCombo.
    getMyHand() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.gameRepresentation.TableRepresentation
    Gets the player's own hand.
    getName() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.network.ClientEndpoint
    Returns the name of the connected player.
    getName() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.player.Player
    Returns the player's name.
    getName() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.server.network.ServerEndpoint
    Returns the name of the connected player.
    getPlayers() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.gameRepresentation.TableRepresentation
    Gets the list of all player representations.
    getPlayers() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.game.Table
    Returns the list of players currently at the table.
    getPotSize() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.gameRepresentation.TableRepresentation
    Returns the pot size as a string.
    getPotSize() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.game.Table
    Returns the size of the pot.
    getSocket() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.network.ClientEndpoint
    Returns the socket connected to the server.
    getSpriteIndex(Card) - Static method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.utils.MyUtils
    Returns the sprite index for a given card.
    getSpriteIndex(Rank, Suit) - Static method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.utils.MyUtils
    Returns the sprite index for a given card rank and suit.
    getSpriteIndex(MyUtils.Sprites) - Static method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.utils.MyUtils
    Returns the sprite index for a non-card UI sprite.
    getTable() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.server.Server
    Returns the game table managed by the server.
    getTableRepresentation(Player, int) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.server.Server
    Creates a TableRepresentation tailored to the given player, containing personalized and general information about the game state.
    getWaitingForIndex() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.gameRepresentation.TableRepresentation
    Gets the index of the player whose turn it is.
    getWaitingForIndex() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.game.Table
    Returns the index of the player currently waiting for their turn.
    getYourIndex() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.gameRepresentation.TableRepresentation
    Gets the index of the player representing the client.
